content.title: We Take Your Business Seriously
content.paragraph1: At Maxima Concrete, commercial work is not just another job — it is a commitment to precision, compliance, and reliability. We specialize in ADA-compliant concrete solutions designed to meet the most demanding regulatory and performance standards.
content.paragraph2: Whether you are upgrading an existing property or building from the ground up, we ensure every project is built with accuracy, safety, and lasting value.

items.title: ADA Parking
items.description: Proper slope, markings, and accessibility compliance.

items.title: Ramps
items.description: Correct incline ratios and smooth transitions for mobility.

items.title: Sidewalks
items.description: Width, cross-slope, and surface finish built to spec.

content.title: ADA Compliance Expertise
content.closing1: We handle ADA work with tight tolerances and full documentation - so your property passes inspection the first time.
content.closing2: Maxima Concrete reads and interprets blueprints to ensure precise execution of every design specification.
content.subtitle: Our team is highly experienced in implementing Americans with Disabilities Act (ADA) requirements for both new builds and remediation projects.

content.title: Commercial Concrete Services
content.closing: From restaurants and retail to banks, warehouses, and multi-unit complexes, we understand the importance of durability, accessibility, and compliance in commercial environments.
content.subtitle: Maxima Concrete provides a complete range of commercial concrete installations, including:

cards.title: Commercial Pools
cards.description: Custom-built commercial pools engineered for safety, durability, and visual impact for hotels, resorts, and properties.

cards.title: Commercial Concrete
cards.description: Heavy-duty concrete services for parking lots, sidewalks, warehouses, and commercial properties built to last.

content.title: Our Commercial Solutions
content.subtitle: Specialized concrete services tailored to your business needs.

items.text: 6.5-Bag (4500 PSI) Fiber-Reinforced Mix for maximum strength
Proven Record Across Central Ohio Counties, Franklin, Delaware, Union, Licking, and Fairfield

content.title: Why Businesses Choose Maxima Concrete
content.closing: Every pour is handled with engineering-level precision, because in commercial concrete, small errors can lead to big liabilities.

content.title:
More Than Concrete,
It's Confidence.
content.description:
Whether it's a custom driveway, patio, or complete backyard transformation, Maxima Concrete delivers lasting beauty and performance.
We don't just pour concrete — we build trust, one project at a time.

items.answer: We typically use a 6.5-bag (4500 PSI) fiber-reinforced mix with 10-gauge wire mesh for strength, crack control, and long-term durability.
items.question: What type of concrete does Maxima use for commercial projects?

items.answer: Yes. We manage new construction, additions, and ADA-compliant remodels, ensuring consistency across all phases.
items.question: Do you handle both new builds and renovations?

items.answer: Absolutely. Our crews are trained to read and execute from blueprints, collaborating seamlessly with general contractors and engineers.
items.question: Can you build to architectural or engineered plans?

items.answer: We serve Columbus, Delaware, Franklin, Union, Licking, and Fairfield Counties — and select neighboring regions across Central Ohio.
items.question: What areas do you serve?
